method: Caliper across both cut walls of two parallel 1.000-in-spaced cuts
notes: Update CAM kerf parameter if delta > tolerance and re-cut KT1

method: Inspect each of three test pierces under shop light with magnification
notes: Replace consumables and re-test if blowout observed

method: Tape measure end-to-end (spike tip to top tip)
Tape measure across the bottom rail
Caliper or scale at three positions
Radius gauge at the three sharpest cusps
notes: If less than 0.150 the cusp may have collapsed; document for next packet

method: Caliper at the narrowest point of each tendril
Drag a clean rag along the full bottom edge

nominal: Coater's blast prep covers any residual
method: Inspect by eye and note any heavy patches; coater handles final

nominal: No bare spots no runs no fiber pickoffs
method: Inspect both faces and all edges under shop light
notes: Reject and request rework if defects exceed spec

method: Compare to a sample swatch from the coater
Lay on a flat reference; check gap with feeler
notes: Heat distortion can warp; powder-coat oven can also relax/induce warp

method: 4-ft level on the longest stem axis

nominal: No rust at edges or coating defects
notes: Note any coating failure for warranty claim with coater
